evals.prompt: 整理分析最新的tag到当前最新的提交内容中之间的更改内容，整理成changelog
evals.expected_output: CHANGELOG.md 的 [Unreleased] 区域被更新，包含中英双语的 Added/Changed/Fixed 条目，覆盖 v0.0.2-alpha 到 HEAD 之间的两个提交的所有变更

evals.prompt: I just tagged v1.2.0 and have been working on several features since. Can you update the changelog with everything since that tag?
evals.expected_output: Analyzes commits since v1.2.0, classifies changes into Added/Changed/Fixed, writes bilingual entries to CHANGELOG.md

evals.prompt: 项目里还没有任何 tag，帮我把从项目开始到现在的所有变更整理成 changelog
evals.expected_output: Handles the no-tag edge case, analyzes all commits from repo root, writes changelog entries
